Research cockpit · Semi tech supply chain

Semi Tech
Industry Mapping

全球半导体与相邻 tech supply chain 的投资研究型底图：从 design/IP、foundry、memory、WFE、materials、OSAT、substrate/PCB、optical、EMS/ODM 到 data-center industrial enablers。主体为中文，公司名和技术术语保留英文。

Open coverage universe Coverage plan Investment framework Sources & CIQ

139Core 优先覆盖
16产业链节点
2026-06-18数据口径日
Map Launch Universe Framework Debates Playbooks Data & sources
1. Where to start

Coverage Launch Cockpit

按产业链环节自动汇总 Core / Important / Watchlist 数量、代表性 Core 公司、第一步研究动作和需要回答的核心问题。这个区块是把 307 家公司 universe 转成 coverage 工作排程的入口。

EDA / IP / Design Enablement

7C / 5I / 2W

Design stack · 14 listed names

Core names
Synopsys; Cadence Design Systems; Arm Holdings; Rambus; Alchip Technologies; Global Unichip; 澜起科技
研究动作
Build peer table separating software-like EDA from IP royalty and design-service models; map each Core company to node complexity and AI/custom-silicon exposure.
核心问题
先进节点设计成本是否继续上升？AI是否提高EDA ASP而非压缩设计服务？大客户自研ASIC会把IP价值池推向哪里？

Compute / AI / Logic Chips

8C / 2I / 3W

Chip design · 13 listed names

Core names
NVIDIA; Broadcom; Advanced Micro Devices; Lattice Semiconductor; 海光信息; 寒武纪; 龙芯中科; Socionext
研究动作
Create AI compute scorecard: accelerator revenue, supply chain bottleneck, customer concentration, inference exposure, ecosystem lock-in and valuation sensitivity.
核心问题
AI capex是否产生足够ROI？custom ASIC会侵蚀GPU还是扩大市场？供应瓶颈从HBM/CoWoS转移到电力和网络了吗？

Mobile / RF / Connectivity

7C / 9I / 10W

Chip design · 26 listed names

Core names
Qualcomm; 韦尔股份; 卓胜微; Sony Group; MediaTek; Realtek Semiconductor; Novatek Microelectronics
研究动作
Split companies into handset-beta, connectivity-beta, display-beta and image-sensor-beta; do not compare RF, CIS and DDI on one multiple without cycle adjustment.
核心问题
端侧AI是否提升SoC和memory BOM？Apple自研对外部RF/连接供应商影响多大？国产替代的ASP是否能守住？

Networking Silicon / SerDes / Data Movement

5C / 3I / 3W

Chip design · 11 listed names

Core names
Marvell Technology; MACOM Technology Solutions; Credo Technology; Astera Labs; Arista Networks
研究动作
Map every company to scale-out, scale-up, electrical or optical layer; build a port-speed migration table from 400G to 800G to 1.6T.
核心问题
Ethernet是否继续吃InfiniBand份额？scale-up互联会让价值转向封装/硅光吗？

Analog / Power / Mixed Signal

14C / 6I / 5W

Chip design · 25 listed names

Core names
Silergy; Microchip Technology; NXP Semiconductors; ON Semiconductor; Monolithic Power Systems; Power Integrations; Diodes Incorporated; 圣邦股份; 斯达半导; Renesas Electronics
研究动作
Separate long-cycle auto/industrial quality names from consumer analog and China localization names; normalize margins for utilization.
核心问题
工业去库存何时结束？AI电源价值量能否抵消传统工业疲弱？SiC价格战是否破坏回报？

Memory / Storage Semiconductors

9C / 3I / 2W

Chip design / manufacturing · 14 listed names

Core names
Sandisk; Seagate Technology; Micron Technology; Samsung Electronics; SK hynix; Kioxia Holdings; Nanya Technology; Phison Electronics; 兆易创新
研究动作
Build memory cycle sheet: ASP, bit growth, utilization, capex and HBM mix; value companies on normalized earnings and scenario margins.
核心问题
HBM是否挤压commodity DRAM供给形成双重紧缺？NAND合同制能否平滑周期？

Foundry / IDM Manufacturing

8C / 3I / 1W

Wafer manufacturing · 12 listed names

Core names
Intel; GlobalFoundries; TSMC; United Microelectronics; 中芯国际; 华虹半导体; X-FAB Silicon Foundries; Tower Semiconductor
研究动作
Separate advanced-node scarcity from mature-node cyclical recovery; build utilization and depreciation sensitivity by node and geography.
核心问题
先进制程是否继续赢家通吃？成熟制程本地化是否带来结构性过剩？Intel Foundry商业模式能否成立？

Semicap Equipment

14C / 9I / 4W

Manufacturing enablement · 27 listed names

Core names
ASML Holding; Applied Materials; Lam Research; Tokyo Electron; SCREEN Holdings; DISCO; ASM International; Aixtron; ACM Research; 中微公司
研究动作
Build WFE wallet-share map by process step and customer; do not treat ASML/Lam/KLA/AMAT/TEL as interchangeable equipment beta.
核心问题
WFE是否进入AI驱动的新上行周期？中国国产替代是否改变全球份额？出口限制对订单质量影响多大？

Process Control / Test / Metrology

10C / 5I / 5W

Manufacturing enablement · 20 listed names

Core names
KLA; Lasertec; Advantest; Teradyne; Onto Innovation; FormFactor; Nova; Camtek; King Yuan Electronics; Technoprobe
研究动作
Split process-control capital equipment from recurring probe/socket consumables; model AI/HBM test time as a separate driver.
核心问题
HBM测试瓶颈是否成为独立价值池？良率控制在2nm/advanced packaging中是否继续升值？

Materials / Wafers / Chemicals / Gases

11C / 15I / 7W

Manufacturing input · 33 listed names

Core names
Shin-Etsu Chemical; SUMCO; GlobalWafers; Siltronic; Soitec; Entegris; Tokyo Ohka Kogyo; Resonac Holdings; 安集科技; Linde
研究动作
Create materials map by consumable frequency and qualification barrier; separate volume cyclicality from structural content growth.
核心问题
先进节点材料复杂度是否提升ASP？本地化会带来份额提升还是价格压力？

OSAT / Advanced Packaging

9C / 5I / 7W

Back-end manufacturing · 21 listed names

Core names
BE Semiconductor Industries; SUSS MicroTec; ASE Technology; Amkor Technology; 长电科技; 通富微电; Powertech Technology; Hanmi Semiconductor; ASMPT
研究动作
Separate traditional OSAT from advanced-packaging equipment and AI packaging capacity; watch capital intensity and customer concentration.
核心问题
OSAT能否在foundry captive packaging之外拿到AI利润池？HBM stack和CoWoS瓶颈如何分配利润？

Substrate / PCB / Interconnect

9C / 13I / 7W

Interconnect / board · 29 listed names

Core names
Unimicron Technology; Ibiden; Nan Ya PCB; Kinsus Interconnect; Elite Material; AT&S; 深南电路; 生益科技; Simmtech
研究动作
Build AI server BOM bridge: substrate, PCB, CCL, connector/cable and thermal content per rack.
核心问题
AI PCB是不是新的盈利池？ABF扩产会否重演过剩？低损耗材料谁最受益？

Optical / Photonics

5C / 3I / 6W

Data movement · 14 listed names

Core names
Coherent; Fabrinet; Ciena; 中际旭创; 新易盛
研究动作
Separate module assemblers from laser/DSP/component suppliers; build port-speed migration and ASP erosion scenarios.
核心问题
光模块ASP下行会多快？CPO/硅光会重塑供应链还是延长现有龙头优势？

EMS / ODM / Systems

10C / 3I / 5W

Systems / assembly · 18 listed names

Core names
Hon Hai Precision / Foxconn; Quanta Computer; Wiwynn; Flex; Jabil; Celestica; Super Micro Computer; Dell Technologies; Hewlett Packard Enterprise; Accton Technology
研究动作
Track AI server dollars and margin separately; compare ODMs on cash conversion, customer mix and rack-scale engineering content.
核心问题
ODM能否留住AI rack-scale价值？毛利率是否因工程复杂度改善？云客户是否压价？

Adjacent Infra / Industrial Enablers

8C / 7I / 13W

Adjacent infrastructure · 28 listed names

Core names
MKS Instruments; Vertiv; Eaton; Schneider Electric; Amphenol; VAT Group; Delta Electronics; 立讯精密
研究动作
Create an AI infrastructure adjacency screen; distinguish chip-cycle exposure from data-center construction and fab-services exposure.
核心问题
半导体价值是否从chip向power/cooling/connector外溢？数据中心电力瓶颈会怎样改变系统架构？

Passives / Components / Sensors

5C / 1I / 6W

Electronic components · 12 listed names

Core names
Murata Manufacturing; TDK; Taiyo Yuden; Yageo; Samsung Electro-Mechanics
研究动作
Separate passive-cycle leaders from display-cycle names and specialty ceramic/package suppliers; normalize for inventory swings.
核心问题
AI服务器和汽车能否抵消消费电子疲软？高端MLCC/电感国产替代会否压价？

Core Coverage Wave Plan

把 Core 139 家公司拆成三组启动波次：先抓 AI infrastructure 主线，再做制造/capex picks-and-shovels，最后系统覆盖周期复苏和 edge/auto/device beta。

Wave 1 - AI infrastructure spine

71 Core companies

AI value-chain source packs, rack-level BOM bridge, bottleneck monitor and first-pass model drivers.

Segments
Adjacent Infra / Industrial Enablers; Compute / AI / Logic Chips; EMS / ODM / Systems; Foundry / IDM Manufacturing; Memory / Storage Semiconductors; Networking Silicon / SerDes / Data Movement; OSAT / Advanced Packaging; Optical / Photonics; Substrate / PCB / Interconnect
Representative names
NVIDIA; Broadcom; Advanced Micro Devices; Intel; Marvell Technology; Lattice Semiconductor; MACOM Technology Solutions; Credo Technology; Astera Labs; GlobalFoundries; Sandisk; Seagate Technology; Micron Technology; Samsung Electronics; SK hynix; Kioxia Holdings

Wave 2 - Manufacturing and capex picks/shovels

42 Core companies

WFE/materials/test wallet-share map, order/backlog tracker and customer capex bridge.

Segments
EDA / IP / Design Enablement; Materials / Wafers / Chemicals / Gases; Process Control / Test / Metrology; Semicap Equipment
Representative names
Synopsys; Cadence Design Systems; Arm Holdings; Rambus; Alchip Technologies; Global Unichip; 澜起科技; ASML Holding; Applied Materials; Lam Research; KLA; Tokyo Electron; SCREEN Holdings; DISCO; Lasertec; Advantest

Wave 3 - Cyclical recovery and edge/auto/device beta

26 Core companies

Inventory-cycle dashboard, auto/industrial recovery tracker and handset/consumer sell-through bridge.

Segments
Analog / Power / Mixed Signal; Mobile / RF / Connectivity; Passives / Components / Sensors
Representative names
Silergy; Qualcomm; Microchip Technology; NXP Semiconductors; ON Semiconductor; Monolithic Power Systems; Power Integrations; Diodes Incorporated; 韦尔股份; 卓胜微; 圣邦股份; 斯达半导; Renesas Electronics; Sony Group; Infineon Technologies; STMicroelectronics
2. Company universe

Coverage Universe

分层口径：Core 为第一批深挖公司，Important 为细分环节重要可比或区域龙头，Watchlist 为产业链边缘、长尾或需事件/数据确认的公司。市场数据字段已预留，当前以 CIQ refresh 为准。

Market fields: market cap / FY revenue / gross margin / EV/Sales / P/E / consensus growth
Ticker Company Priority Listing market Segment Products Key debates Market data
3. Evidence and data posture

Official Market Context

这里仅放官方/一手行业层数据，用于判断产业周期和研究重点，不直接替代公司级 CIQ/filings。所有市场数据都有发布日期和来源链接。

TopicLatest public readAs ofInvestment useCoverage implicationSource
Global semiconductor sales run-rate April 2026 global semiconductor sales were $110.5B, up 11.0% month-to-month and 93.9% year-to-year. Release date 2026-06-05; monthly sales are a three-month moving average. Use as a top-down cycle gauge and demand-momentum check, not as a company-level revenue proxy. Elevates AI-exposed compute, memory, networking, foundry, OSAT, substrate/PCB, optical and power/cooling chains. https://www.semiconductors.org/global-semiconductor-sales-increase-11-month-to-month-in-april/
WSTS Spring 2026 forecast SIA endorsed WSTS Spring 2026 forecast projecting 2026 global semiconductor sales growth of 90% to $1.5T and 2027 sales above $1.9T. Release date 2026-06-05. Treat as top-down market context; pressure-test against company guidance, channel inventory and pricing. Requires separate bull/base/bear logic for AI winners versus lagging auto/industrial/consumer chains. https://www.semiconductors.org/global-semiconductor-sales-increase-11-month-to-month-in-april/
AI data-center semiconductor value content SIA/Deloitte reported chips account for more than 95% of a leading AI server rack content value and over 50% of AI data-center capex. Release date 2026-06-01. Use to justify rack-level value bridge rather than stopping at accelerator revenue. For AI coverage, model accelerator + HBM + package/substrate + networking/optical + power/analog + system integration. https://www.semiconductors.org/new-report-finds-semiconductors-account-for-95-of-an-ai-data-server-racks-value-encompassing-the-full-stack-of-chip-technologies/
AI data-center semiconductor revenue opportunity The SIA/Deloitte release states annual revenue from semiconductors used in AI data centers could reach over $1.2T by 2028. Release date 2026-06-01. Use as a strategic TAM marker, then reconcile to company-specific capacity, share and ASP assumptions. High TAM does not remove bottleneck risk; monitor power, HBM, CoWoS, optical and customer ROI. https://www.semiconductors.org/new-report-finds-semiconductors-account-for-95-of-an-ai-data-server-racks-value-encompassing-the-full-stack-of-chip-technologies/
AI rack chip count and full-stack demand The SIA/Deloitte release says a single AI server rack contains over 4,500 packaged chips across logic, memory, analog and foundational technologies. Release date 2026-06-01. Use to map second- and third-order beneficiaries beyond GPU/ASIC leaders. Supports including analog/power, sensors/controllers, passives, interconnect and EMS/ODM in the semi-tech mapping boundary. https://www.semiconductors.org/new-report-finds-semiconductors-account-for-95-of-an-ai-data-server-racks-value-encompassing-the-full-stack-of-chip-technologies/
Silicon wafer cycle split SEMI reported 2025 silicon wafer shipments increased 5.8% to 12,973 MSI while revenue slipped 1.2% to $11.4B. Release date 2026-02-10. Use as materials-layer cycle check: units can recover while pricing/mix revenue remains soft. Separate advanced logic/HBM wafer demand from mature-node recovery and legacy pricing pressure. https://www.semi.org/en/semi-press-release/semi-reports-2025-annual-worldwide-silicon-wafer-shipments-and-revenue-results

Data Governance Layers

为了让底稿能继续升级成估值和监控系统，这里把事实、市场数据和分析师判断分层，防止把不同证据强度的内容混在一起。

Layer 1 - Official industry facts

Examples
SIA/WSTS sales releases, SEMI wafer/equipment/materials releases, official industry reports.
Allowed use
Market size, cycle direction, source methodology, high-level end-market framing.
Do not use for
Do not infer company revenue, margins, valuation or market share without company/CIQ tie-out.

Layer 2 - Company primary facts

Examples
Annual reports, 10-K/20-F, exchange filings, investor presentations, earnings calls and official IR tables.
Allowed use
Company description, segment exposure, customer concentration, products, capex, financial history.
Do not use for
Do not mix fiscal years, currencies or dual listings without explicit normalization.

Layer 3 - Market data and consensus

Examples
CIQ export: market cap, EV, FY revenue, GM, EV/Sales, P/E, consensus growth, ownership and short interest.
Allowed use
Valuation screens, comp tables, liquidity/ownership checks and estimate-revision monitoring.
Do not use for
Do not publish stale values or combine non-synchronous prices, shares and estimates.

Layer 4 - Analyst judgment

Examples
Priority tier, segment mapping, bull/base/bear variables, key debates, coverage waves and research actions.
Allowed use
Investment framing, research workflow, monitoring design and thesis/falsifier construction.
Do not use for
Do not present judgment as sourced fact; keep it separate from official data and CIQ fields.
4. Investment framework

Investment Framework

这张底图的用途不是只知道“谁做什么”，而是把每个环节转换为可跟踪的投资问题：领先指标、模型入口、估值锚和反证条件。

需求层

Cloud AI capex、手机/PC换机、汽车电子、工业PMI、通信网络建设决定不同链条的收入弹性。

供给层

HBM、CoWoS、ABF substrate、先进制程、EUV/DUV、800G/1.6T optics 是当前最关键的瓶颈集合。

周期层

memory 看 ASP/bit supply，analog 看库存和book-to-bill，WFE 看 orders/backlog，foundry 看 utilization 和 node mix。

估值层

软件/IP 用 recurring growth，AI semis 用 revenue durability，设备/materials 用 mid-cycle FCF，memory/foundry 用 normalized earnings。

End-Market Exposure Matrix

用 Very High / High / Medium / Low 标记每个产业链环节对六类终端需求的敏感度，便于从宏观/客户 capex/产品周期快速定位应该先看哪些公司。

SegmentAI Data CenterSmartphone / ConsumerAuto / IndustrialFab LocalizationNetworking / OpticalStorage / Memory BWResearch read
EDA / IP / Design EnablementHighMediumMediumHighMediumMediumEDA/IP is a leading indicator for future tape-outs; AI ASIC and advanced-node design complexity are the highest-signal angles.
Compute / AI / Logic ChipsVery HighMediumMediumMediumHighHighCore AI compute value pool; test whether revenue durability, software ecosystem and supply allocation justify valuation.
Mobile / RF / ConnectivityLowVery HighMediumMediumLowLowMostly consumer/device cycle, with edge AI and auto connectivity optionality; separate sell-through from restock.
Networking Silicon / SerDes / Data MovementVery HighLowLowMediumVery HighMediumData movement is the second-order AI value pool after accelerators/HBM; watch port-speed and architecture shifts.
Analog / Power / Mixed SignalMediumMediumVery HighMediumLowLowCycle and quality diverge sharply by end market; AI power is additive but industrial/auto inventory still matters.
Memory / Storage SemiconductorsVery HighHighLowMediumLowVery HighHBM is structural, but DRAM/NAND remain cyclical; use separate HBM and commodity memory supply-demand bridges.
Foundry / IDM ManufacturingVery HighHighHighVery HighMediumMediumManufacturing layer links every demand bucket; advanced nodes and mature-node localization have different valuation anchors.
Semicap EquipmentHighMediumMediumVery HighMediumHighCapital equipment sees demand through customer capex; order quality and China pull-forward are the central issues.
Process Control / Test / MetrologyHighMediumMediumHighMediumHighComplexity lever: advanced nodes, HBM, chiplets and packaging raise test/metrology intensity.
Materials / Wafers / Chemicals / GasesHighMediumMediumVery HighMediumHighMaterials are utilization and qualification stories; advanced-node intensity and local qualification matter more than headline capex.
OSAT / Advanced PackagingVery HighHighMediumHighMediumHighAdvanced packaging is a bottleneck, but benefits concentrate in qualified capacity, equipment and materials.
Substrate / PCB / InterconnectVery HighMediumMediumMediumHighHighAI rack complexity drives layer count, substrate demand and low-loss material; monitor ASP erosion versus mix.
Optical / PhotonicsVery HighLowLowLowVery HighMedium800G/1.6T is high beta to AI cluster scale-out; margins depend on customer awards, laser yield and ASP curve.
EMS / ODM / SystemsVery HighHighMediumLowHighHighSystem integration converts component shortages into revenue, but pass-through economics and working capital are decisive.
Adjacent Infra / Industrial EnablersVery HighLowMediumHighMediumMediumPower, cooling, connectors and fab services are where semiconductor demand meets physical infrastructure constraints.
Passives / Components / SensorsMediumHighHighLowMediumMediumInventory-cycle and mix-upgrade layer; high-end server/auto components can diverge from commodity consumer parts.

Model Architecture

一线研究的关键不是把公司放进表格，而是把需求、瓶颈、收入、毛利、估值和催化剂连成可更新的模型链条。

Demand bridge

从 end-market 需求反推半导体链条收入弹性。

Inputs
Cloud capex、AI server/rack build、smartphone/PC units、auto/industrial production、telecom capex。
Output
每个 segment 的 demand beta、lead/lag 关系和订单质量判断。

Supply / bottleneck bridge

识别哪里是真正瓶颈，哪里只是价格或库存传导。

Inputs
HBM capacity、CoWoS/advanced packaging、EUV/DUV、ABF substrate、800G/1.6T optics、power/cooling。
Output
约束链条、受益顺序、capex 拉动和反证信号。

Company revenue model

把行业驱动落到单公司 segment revenue / product mix。

Inputs
CIQ segment data、公司 IR/filings、月度收入、客户/地域 split、产品 ASP/unit/mix。
Output
FY0/FY1/FY2 revenue bridge、关键 driver sensitivity、bull/base/bear 情景。

Margin and capital intensity

避免只看收入增长，解释毛利、折旧、working capital 和 FCF。

Inputs
gross margin、utilization、depreciation、capex、NWC、service/recurring mix、raw-material pass-through。
Output
normalized margin、cycle margin、FCF conversion、ROIC/capex ROI 判断。

Valuation / comp framework

根据商业模式选择估值锚，而非全行业统一倍数。

Inputs
EV/Sales、EV/EBITDA、P/E、FCF yield、P/B、mid-cycle EPS、growth duration、revision trend。
Output
segment-specific comp set、估值区间、需要 CIQ 刷新的缺口。

Catalyst and falsifier tracker

把 thesis 变成可日常监控的事件和数据。

Inputs
earnings dates、product launches、capex updates、pricing data、export-control changes、monthly revenue。
Output
1/3/6/12个月 catalyst、thesis breaks、watchlist upgrade/downgrade triggers。

Segment KPI Monitor

每个产业链节点需要看的领先指标不同。这里把 decision question、指标、数据来源、更新频率、模型连接和常见误判拆开，后续可以直接升级为月度 tracker。

EDA / IP / Design Enablement

Decision question
设计启动和先进节点复杂度是否仍在推高 EDA/IP wallet share？
Metrics
RPO/ARR; design starts; emulation/prototyping demand; IP royalty; advanced-node tape-out wins
Source lane
公司订单/RPO披露、foundry PDK/节点节奏、客户 tape-out commentary、CIQ segment revenue
Cadence
季度为主，重大客户/节点事件临时更新
Model link
收入模型用 subscription + IP royalty + design-service milestone；估值看 recurring growth 和 RPO 转化。
Watchout
EDA 是长周期续费业务，不要把单季 license timing 误读成结构性加速或减速。

Compute / AI / Logic Chips

Decision question
AI accelerator / ASIC 收入可见度是否足以支撑当前估值和毛利？
Metrics
hyperscaler capex; GPU/ASIC backlog; HBM attach; CoWoS allocation; datacenter GM; product cadence
Source lane
hyperscaler capex、vendor backlog/commentary、TSMC HPC mix、HBM supply agreement、CIQ consensus revisions
Cadence
月度 capex/供应链跟踪 + 季度财报更新
Model link
拆 accelerator unit、ASP、HBM/package constraint、networking/software attach 和 customer concentration。
Watchout
不要只看 GPU revenue；需要验证 power、network、HBM、package 是否同步支持出货。

Mobile / RF / Connectivity

Decision question
消费电子库存去化和高端机 mix 是否真正改善内容量和 ASP？
Metrics
handset sell-through; Android channel inventory; Apple build plan; RF content; Wi-Fi/Bluetooth attach; DDI/CIS pricing
Source lane
手机供应链月度收入、渠道库存、客户新品 BOM、公司 design-win commentary、CIQ segment/geography split
Cadence
月度供应链 + 季度公司更新
Model link
把 handset beta、RF content、CIS/DDI、connectivity 分开建模，不用一个消费电子倍数套所有公司。
Watchout
restocking 与 sell-through recovery 需要区分；低端 Android 补库存不等于高质量复苏。

Networking Silicon / SerDes / Data Movement

Decision question
AI scale-out 网络升级是否把价值留在 switch/SerDes/DSP/retimer？
Metrics
switch port speed mix; retimer attach; optical DSP ASP; Ethernet vs InfiniBand share; AI cluster topology
Source lane
cloud networking capex、Arista/NVIDIA/Broadcom/Marvell commentary、optical award、CIQ consensus revisions
Cadence
月度供应链信号 + 季度财报
Model link
按 port speed、radix、retimer/DSP attach 和 ASIC/custom silicon pipeline 拆收入。
Watchout
AI server 出货和网络芯片出货存在节奏差；需要用 cluster architecture 校验拉货质量。

Analog / Power / Mixed Signal

Decision question
工业/汽车去库存是否结束，AI power 是否足以抵消传统周期？
Metrics
book-to-bill; distributor inventory; auto production; EV inverter demand; SiC utilization; AI server power content
Source lane
分销商库存、公司 backlog/order commentary、汽车产量、工业 PMI、CIQ margin/segment estimates
Cadence
月度宏观/渠道 + 季度财报
Model link
把 long-cycle auto/industrial、consumer analog、AI power、SiC/GaN 分开建收入和毛利。
Watchout
模拟公司利润弹性经常来自 utilization 而非单纯收入增速；周期底部要看库存质量。

Memory / Storage Semiconductors

Decision question
HBM 结构性 mix 改善是否能穿越 DRAM/NAND 周期？
Metrics
DRAM/NAND contract ASP; bit shipment; inventory days; HBM qualification/share; memory capex; enterprise SSD demand
Source lane
memory pricing tracker、公司 capex/ASP commentary、HBM qualification news、CIQ consensus/margin revisions
Cadence
月度价格/库存 + 季度公司更新
Model link
用 ASP、bit growth、capex discipline、HBM mix 和 utilization 做 normalized earnings，而非年化峰值 EPS。
Watchout
HBM 紧缺可能掩盖 commodity DRAM/NAND 供给；要单独看 HBM 与非 HBM 的供需。

Foundry / IDM Manufacturing

Decision question
先进制程和成熟制程的稼动率/定价是否分化？
Metrics
utilization; wafer ASP; node mix; capex/depreciation; advanced-node share; customer concentration; geopolitics
Source lane
foundry 月度收入、公司法说、客户 tape-out、capex guidance、CIQ segment/geography data
Cadence
月度收入 + 季度稼动率/节点 mix
Model link
先进 foundry 看 node leadership 和 HPC mix；成熟 foundry 看 utilization recovery、P/B 和政策产能。
Watchout
成熟制程本地化可能同时带来份额提升和价格压力，不能只看产能扩张。

Semicap Equipment

Decision question
WFE 订单是 AI/HBM 多年上行，还是 China pull-forward / memory catch-up？
Metrics
WFE TAM; orders/backlog; book-to-bill; service revenue; China mix; memory vs logic capex; export-control impact
Source lane
SEMI/WFE 数据、公司 backlog、客户 capex、出口管制更新、CIQ order/revenue revisions
Cadence
月度行业数据 + 季度订单/收入
Model link
按 process step、客户、China exposure、service mix 和 backlog quality 建 wallet-share 模型。
Watchout
设备收入滞后订单；高 China mix 可能是拉动也可能是未来回落风险。

Process Control / Test / Metrology

Decision question
先进制程、HBM 和 advanced packaging 是否提高 metrology/ATE/probe 价值量？
Metrics
test time; probe-card ASP; ATE platform adoption; inspection intensity; OSAT capex; AI/HBM product ramps
Source lane
KLA/Advantest/Teradyne/Technoprobe commentary、OSAT capex、HBM stack/test bottleneck、CIQ margins
Cadence
季度为主，AI/HBM ramp 事件临时更新
Model link
把 capital equipment 与 probe/socket consumables 分开；AI/HBM test time 用单独 driver。
Watchout
ATE/probe 的周期不像 WFE 完全同步；新平台 timing 与客户 qualification 很关键。

Materials / Wafers / Chemicals / Gases

Decision question
晶圆开工率和先进材料用量是否足以带动耗材 ASP/mix？
Metrics
wafer starts; wafer shipment; fab utilization; specialty gas pricing; EUV/photoresist demand; qualification wins
Source lane
材料公司出货/价格、foundry utilization、WFE install base、客户认证进展、CIQ segment data
Cadence
月度/季度，取决于材料披露频率
Model link
按 consumable frequency、qualification barrier、localization 和 raw-material pass-through 建模。
Watchout
材料收入通常滞后 WFE 安装和稼动率；国产替代可能牺牲 ASP/GM。

OSAT / Advanced Packaging

Decision question
先进封装利润池由 OSAT、foundry captive packaging 还是设备/材料捕获？
Metrics
CoWoS/2.5D capacity; HBM stack demand; OSAT utilization; packaging capex; substrate lead time; customer prepayment
Source lane
TSMC/ASE/Amkor/PTI/JCET commentary、packaging equipment orders、substrate data、CIQ segment margins
Cadence
月度供应链 + 季度 capex/utilization
Model link
拆 traditional OSAT 与 advanced packaging；用 utilization、capex ROI、客户预付款和 mix 建毛利。
Watchout
先进封装紧缺不等于所有 OSAT 受益；需验证 qualification 和客户分配。

Substrate / PCB / Interconnect

Decision question
AI server/rack 的 ABF、PCB、low-loss material 内容量是否持续提升？
Metrics
ABF utilization; layer count; low-loss material mix; AI server share; substrate lead time; yield; customer concentration
Source lane
PCB/substrate 月度收入、ODM build plan、AI accelerator/rack BOM、材料供应商 commentary、CIQ margins
Cadence
月度供应链 + 季度毛利/mix
Model link
按 AI server share、layer count、material mix、yield 和 ASP erosion 建收入/GM sensitivity。
Watchout
单位增长可能被 ASP erosion 抵消；consumer PCB cycle 与 AI PCB 不能混看。

Optical / Photonics

Decision question
800G/1.6T 需求能否抵消光模块 ASP erosion？
Metrics
800G/1.6T awards; module ASP; laser yield; optical DSP content; hyperscaler concentration; telecom inventory
Source lane
光模块公司月度收入、hyperscaler award、Arista/NVIDIA architecture、laser/DSP suppliers、CIQ revisions
Cadence
月度收入 + 季度 award/margin
Model link
拆 module assembler、laser/component、DSP、contract manufacturing；单独建 port-speed migration 和 ASP curve。
Watchout
光模块高增长也可能低质量，如果价格下降快于速率/出货升级。

EMS / ODM / Systems

Decision question
AI server/ODM 收入增长能否转化为现金流和可持续毛利？
Metrics
AI server mix; rack-scale awards; backlog; working capital; customer concentration; gross margin; cash conversion
Source lane
台湾 ODM 月度收入、hyperscaler capex、AI rack program、公司 margin/working capital、CIQ segment estimates
Cadence
月度收入 + 季度现金流
Model link
用 pass-through revenue、engineering value-add、rack integration、NWC 和 customer concentration 建模型。
Watchout
ODM 收入大、毛利薄；AI server ramp 可能压 working capital 和现金流。

Adjacent Infra / Industrial Enablers

Decision question
AI power/cooling/connectors 是结构性增量，还是项目型 capex 高峰？
Metrics
data-center power backlog; liquid-cooling attach; rack power density; connector/cable content; fab project awards
Source lane
industrial company backlog、data-center capex、rack BOM、liquid-cooling adoption、CIQ order/revenue revisions
Cadence
季度 backlog + 重大项目事件
Model link
区分 product margin 与 project/turnkey margin；用 backlog conversion、content per rack 和 attach rate 建模。
Watchout
订单强不代表利润强，项目执行、交付节奏和成本 pass-through 是关键。

Passives / Components / Sensors

Decision question
被动元件/电子组件库存周期是否触底，高端 server/auto mix 是否提升？
Metrics
distributor inventory; MLCC/resistor pricing; utilization; auto/server mix; high-frequency component demand
Source lane
被动元件月度收入、渠道库存、auto/server build、公司 pricing/mix commentary、CIQ margins
Cadence
月度收入/价格 + 季度库存
Model link
把 commodity consumer components 与 high-end auto/server components 分开建 ASP、utilization 和 GM。
Watchout
渠道补库存容易制造假复苏；要看终端 sell-through 和价格纪律。

Bull / Base / Bear Scenario Variables

每个 segment 的情景变量不同：这里把 bull/base/bear 的核心假设和最先要看的反证指标列出来，后续可以直接变成模型 sensitivity tab。

SegmentBull caseBase caseBear caseWatch first
EDA / IP / Design Enablement AI ASIC and chiplet design starts accelerate; RPO conversion and IP royalty mix expand. Advanced-node complexity supports steady growth, but large-deal timing creates quarterly noise. Design starts slow as AI ROI is questioned or large customers internalize more tooling/IP. RPO, design-start commentary, emulation demand, IP royalty growth.
Compute / AI / Logic Chips AI training/inference demand broadens; supply constraints remain favorable and software/platform attach holds margins. AI demand remains strong but customer concentration and supply bottlenecks cap upside visibility. Hyperscaler ROI slows, custom ASIC pressure rises, or HBM/CoWoS constraints shift from scarcity to overbuild. Cloud capex revisions, backlog, HBM allocation, datacenter GM, product cadence.
Mobile / RF / Connectivity Premium handset refresh, edge AI content and RF integration lift content per device. Inventory normalizes slowly and content gains offset muted unit growth. Android/iPhone units disappoint, customer insourcing rises or China price competition compresses ASP. Handset sell-through, build plans, RF module pricing, channel inventory.
Networking Silicon / SerDes / Data Movement Ethernet scale-out and 800G/1.6T upgrades raise switch, DSP, retimer and SerDes content. AI networking grows but architecture/customer timing creates lumpy ramps. Cluster architecture changes reduce external content or customer awards concentrate away from public suppliers. Port-speed roadmap, hyperscaler awards, optical DSP share, retimer attach.
Analog / Power / Mixed Signal Industrial/auto destocking ends and AI server power becomes a material incremental driver. Recovery is uneven by product line; utilization improves gradually. Distributor restock fades, EV growth slows or SiC/power pricing worsens. Book-to-bill, distributor inventory, industrial PMI, EV inverter demand.
Memory / Storage Semiconductors HBM tightness and disciplined capex lift both mix and commodity memory pricing. HBM remains strong while DRAM/NAND cycles recover at different speeds. HBM capacity additions and commodity capex create a new supply glut. HBM qualification, contract ASP, inventory days, memory capex.
Foundry / IDM Manufacturing Advanced-node demand and CoWoS capacity sustain pricing/utilization while mature nodes recover. Advanced and mature nodes diverge; depreciation and capex ROI remain key debates. Mature-node overcapacity worsens and advanced-node customer concentration creates pricing pressure. Utilization, wafer ASP, node mix, capex, customer tape-outs.
Semicap Equipment AI/HBM/leading-edge capex creates a multi-year WFE upcycle with service mix support. Orders improve but China pull-forward and memory catch-up create uneven quality. Backlog rolls over after export-control pull-forward or memory capex pauses. Orders, backlog, book-to-bill, China mix, customer capex.
Process Control / Test / Metrology HBM, advanced packaging and 2nm complexity raise test/metrology intensity faster than WFE. AI/HBM helps but platform timing and customer qualification remain lumpy. OSAT/memory capex pauses or new tester/probe platforms miss customer ramps. Test time, probe ASP, ATE platform adoption, OSAT capex.
Materials / Wafers / Chemicals / Gases Wafer starts recover and advanced-node material intensity/qualification wins lift mix. Utilization recovery is gradual while advanced materials outperform commodity inputs. Fab utilization disappoints or localization competition erodes pricing/margins. Wafer shipments, fab utilization, qualification wins, gas/chemical pricing.
OSAT / Advanced Packaging Advanced packaging remains a binding AI bottleneck with pricing power and customer pre-commitments. Advanced packaging grows but traditional OSAT remains cyclical and lower margin. Capacity normalizes faster than expected or value capture stays captive inside foundry/GPU platforms. CoWoS/HBM stack capacity, OSAT utilization, substrate lead time, packaging capex.
Substrate / PCB / Interconnect AI rack layer count, ABF demand and low-loss material mix drive durable content growth. AI PCB/substrate outgrows consumer but ASP erosion offsets part of unit/mix gains. Capacity additions and customer bargaining compress margins despite higher shipments. Layer count, ABF utilization, AI server mix, low-loss material share.
Optical / Photonics 800G/1.6T adoption and laser/component scarcity keep revenue and margins ahead of ASP erosion. Units grow strongly but pricing declines require careful margin underwriting. Module ASP erosion outruns unit growth or customer awards shift unexpectedly. 800G/1.6T awards, ASP curve, laser yield, hyperscaler concentration.
EMS / ODM / Systems Rack-scale AI systems lift ODM engineering value and backlog converts to cash. Revenue grows but margins remain constrained by pass-through hardware and working capital. Customer timing slips, inventory builds or AI server mix dilutes cash conversion. AI server monthly revenue, backlog, working capital, gross margin.
Adjacent Infra / Industrial Enablers Power/cooling/connectors become durable AI infrastructure bottlenecks with backlog and attach-rate growth. Data-center projects support growth but project mix keeps margin outcomes uneven. Backlog converts poorly, project timing slips or cost inflation erodes margins. Power density, liquid-cooling attach, backlog conversion, project margin.
Passives / Components / Sensors Distributor inventory bottoms and high-end auto/server component mix improves pricing and utilization. Inventory correction fades gradually with uneven pricing by product line. Restock proves temporary and commodity pricing remains weak. Distributor inventory, component pricing, utilization, auto/server mix.

Variant Perception / Key Debates

把行业地图进一步翻译成买方研究问题：哪些是共识、哪些是可能的非共识、受益链条是谁、应该跟踪什么高频信号，以及什么情况会证伪当前 thesis。

AI capex 是长期平台迁移，还是被短期算力稀缺和融资环境放大的周期？

Consensus
AI infrastructure demand remains structurally strong and supply-constrained.
Variant Question
如果训练 scaling law 或 enterprise ROI 放缓，GPU/HBM/optical/ODM 的订单可见度会先在哪一层破？
Segments
Compute/AI chips, HBM, foundry, advanced packaging, optical, EMS/ODM, power/cooling.
Potential Winners
NVIDIA, Broadcom, AMD, Marvell, TSMC, SK hynix, Micron, Vertiv, Delta, Arista, Innolight, Quanta, Wiwynn.
Risks
High-multiple AI supply-chain names with customer concentration, pass-through margin risk or late-cycle capacity additions.
Monitoring
Hyperscaler capex revisions, AI server backlog, GPU lead times, HBM contract pricing, power availability, cloud gross margin commentary.
Falsifier
Order pushouts across ODM/optical/substrate layers while GPU supply improves; cloud capex cuts without offsetting utilization data.

Custom ASIC 会不会显著削弱 GPU 经济池？

Consensus
GPU remains dominant for general-purpose training/inference, while custom ASIC expands total AI silicon TAM.
Variant Question
Hyperscaler workloads是否足够标准化，使ASIC在推理或内部训练中获得更大份额？
Segments
Compute/AI chips, ASIC services, EDA/IP, foundry, networking silicon.
Potential Winners
Broadcom, Marvell, Alchip, GUC, TSMC, Synopsys, Cadence, Astera/Credo for connectivity.
Risks
GPU-only exposure if software ecosystem and time-to-market advantages narrow.
Monitoring
ASIC tape-outs, NRE backlog, hyperscaler chip program disclosures, TSMC HPC mix, EDA/IP RPO, supply allocation.
Falsifier
ASIC ramps fail to reach volume or remain limited to narrow workloads; GPU software attach and inference share continue rising.

HBM 是 memory 新结构性利润池，还是高景气 DRAM 周期的另一种表现？

Consensus
HBM mix structurally improves memory margins and tightens commodity DRAM supply.
Variant Question
HBM capacity expansion会不会在 12-24 个月后形成新一轮供给过剩？
Segments
Memory, WFE, test, advanced packaging, substrates.
Potential Winners
SK hynix, Micron, Samsung, Advantest, Hanmi Semiconductor, Lam, Applied Materials, DISCO, BESI.
Risks
Memory names if investors annualize peak ASP/margins; late entrants if qualification misses.
Monitoring
HBM qualification share, DRAM capex, contract ASP, memory inventory days, HBM test/stacking bottlenecks.
Falsifier
HBM pricing rolls over while capacity additions accelerate; commodity DRAM supply discipline breaks.

先进封装/CoWoS 是独立利润池，还是 TSMC captive advantage 的延伸？

Consensus
Advanced packaging remains a bottleneck and captures more value in AI systems.
Variant Question
OSAT和设备/材料供应商能拿到多少经济价值，还是主要被foundry和GPU平台吸收？
Segments
OSAT, packaging equipment, substrate, process control/test, foundry.
Potential Winners
TSMC, ASE, Amkor, BESI, ASMPT, Hanmi, Unimicron, Ibiden, Kinsus, TOWA, Technoprobe.
Risks
Traditional OSAT capacity with limited advanced-package qualification.
Monitoring
CoWoS capacity, HBM stack demand, substrate lead time, packaging equipment orders, OSAT capex/customer prepayments.
Falsifier
Advanced packaging capacity normalizes faster than expected; pricing or utilization weakens despite AI demand.

中国半导体国产替代是可持续份额提升，还是政策驱动的局部过热？

Consensus
Localization remains a multi-year structural theme across equipment, materials, analog/RF/power and mature foundry.
Variant Question
哪些环节真正形成技术/客户壁垒，哪些只是受益于补贴、进口替代和订单前置？
Segments
China WFE, materials, mature foundry, OSAT, analog/RF, power, PCB/optical.
Potential Winners
NAURA, AMEC, Piotech, Anji, SMIC, Hua Hong, Will Semi, Maxscend, SG Micro, StarPower, JCET, Shennan, Innolight.
Risks
Global suppliers with high China mix; China names exposed to price competition and subsidy-led overcapacity.
Monitoring
Domestic tool qualification, China fab capex, gross margins, export-control updates, customer concentration, pricing trends.
Falsifier
Localization revenue grows but margins collapse; major tools/materials fail advanced-node qualification.

WFE 是否进入 AI/HBM 驱动的新上行周期？

Consensus
AI, HBM and leading-edge logic raise equipment intensity and extend WFE upcycle.
Variant Question
当前订单中有多少是真实 multi-year demand，多少是 China pull-forward 或 memory catch-up？
Segments
WFE, process control, materials, foundry, memory.
Potential Winners
ASML, AMAT, Lam, KLA, TEL, ASM International, Advantest, DISCO, Screen, Onto, Nova.
Risks
Equipment names if China/export-control pull-forward reverses or memory capex pauses.
Monitoring
SEMI/WFE forecasts, tool backlog, service revenue, customer capex, China mix, memory capex discipline.
Falsifier
Backlog converts poorly, orders roll over despite AI demand, or customers cut capex after pull-forward.

Optical / 800G / 1.6T 是长期AI网络瓶颈，还是模块价格快速商品化？

Consensus
AI scale-out requires faster optical links and supports 800G/1.6T growth.
Variant Question
价值会留在DSP/laser/component，还是被模块组装和客户压价稀释？
Segments
Optical modules, lasers, optical DSP, networking silicon, PCB/materials.
Potential Winners
Innolight, Eoptolink, Coherent, Lumentum, Fabrinet, Marvell, MACOM, Credo, Broadcom.
Risks
Module assemblers if ASP erosion outruns unit growth; telecom-exposed names if cloud strength masks carrier weakness.
Monitoring
800G/1.6T awards, ASP erosion, laser yield, hyperscaler customer concentration, switch port-speed roadmaps.
Falsifier
Unit growth persists but revenue/margin underperform because pricing falls faster than expected.

AI value是否向 power / cooling / connectors 等 industrial layers 外溢？

Consensus
Data-center power density and rack-scale architecture raise non-chip content.
Variant Question
这些工业链条是结构性长期受益，还是订单高峰后的项目型周期？
Segments
Adjacent infrastructure, EMS/ODM, substrate/PCB, analog/power, connectors/cables.
Potential Winners
Vertiv, Eaton, Schneider, Delta, Amphenol, TE Connectivity, Luxshare, Lotes, BizLink, Auras, Lite-On.
Risks
Names with project-margin dilution, customer concentration or capacity built for temporary bottlenecks.
Monitoring
Liquid cooling attach, power density, utility constraints, backlog conversion, rack-level BOM, ODM customer awards.
Falsifier
Backlog grows but margins fall; project timing slips while chip supply normalizes.

汽车/工业半导体去库存何时真正结束？

Consensus
Auto/industrial is bottoming after a long inventory correction, but recovery timing varies by product.
Variant Question
哪些公司是真正 end-demand recovery，哪些只是 channel restock？
Segments
Analog, power, MCU, sensors, passives, specialty foundry.
Potential Winners
NXP, Infineon, STMicro, Renesas, TI, ADI, ON Semi, MPS, ROHM, Melexis, X-FAB, Tower, Murata, Yageo.
Risks
Auto/industrial names if distributors rebuild too early or EV growth slows further.
Monitoring
Distributor inventory, book-to-bill, auto production, EV inverter demand, industrial PMI, lead times.
Falsifier
Orders recover without sell-through; utilization remains weak and pricing pressure persists.
5. Supply-chain map

Value Pool Scoreboard

为了避免把所有半导体公司都塞进同一个 comp table，这里按收入模式、毛利属性、资本强度、周期 beta、AI leverage 和估值锚拆分。

SegmentRevenue ModelMargin ProfileCapital IntensityCycle BetaAI LeverageValuation Anchor
EDA / IP / Design Enablement Subscription / maintenance / IP royalty / design-service NRE Very high software-like gross margin for EDA/IP; lower but still attractive for ASIC services Low Low to medium; design activity is steadier than wafer shipments High through custom ASIC, accelerated design complexity and advanced-node verification Recurring revenue growth, RPO, FCF margin, IP royalty durability
Compute / AI / Logic Chips Product sales, platform attach, networking/system bundles, custom silicon NRE and production revenue High for differentiated accelerators/platform chips; can dilute when systems pass-through rises Low internal capex but high external supply-chain prepayments and inventory commitments High, but currently dominated by cloud AI capex and supply constraints Very high AI revenue durability, gross margin ceiling, customer concentration, supply bottleneck control
Mobile / RF / Connectivity Chip/module sales into handset, IoT, auto connectivity and consumer platforms Medium to high; premium RF/CIS/SoC can be attractive, DDI and low-end connectivity more commoditized Low to medium; mostly fabless but inventory and module content matter High for handset/display, medium for IoT/connectivity Medium through edge AI and premium device content Unit cycle, content per device, customer concentration and inventory normalization
Networking Silicon / SerDes / Data Movement Silicon product sales, custom silicon programs, optical DSP/retimer content and platform software attach High when IP and product differentiation are strong; module-adjacent silicon faces ASP pressure Low internal capex; high dependence on advanced foundry and package allocation High, tied to cloud AI capex and port-speed transitions Very high Port-speed migration, attach rates, hyperscaler awards, custom silicon backlog
Analog / Power / Mixed Signal Broad SKU chip/device/module sales, often through direct and distributor channels Medium to high; strongest in proprietary analog, auto/industrial and high-performance power Medium to high for IDMs and SiC; low to medium for fabless analog Medium to high; inventory cycles can be long and painful Medium, rising through AI server power and power density Through-cycle FCF, inventory inflection, design-in quality and utilization recovery
Memory / Storage Semiconductors Commodity and specialty memory bit shipments, contract pricing, SSD/HDD/storage product sales Highly cyclical; HBM and enterprise storage improve mix but do not eliminate cycle risk Very high Very high Very high through HBM and AI storage Normalized earnings, memory ASP cycle, HBM mix, capex discipline
Foundry / IDM Manufacturing Wafer sales, process platform services, specialty foundry, captive IDM product economics High at leading edge when scarce; lower and more volatile at mature nodes when utilization falls Very high High; utilization and depreciation drive earnings torque High for advanced foundry and packaging; medium for mature nodes Utilization, node mix, capex ROI, depreciation, geopolitical risk premium
Semicap Equipment Tool sales, service, spares, upgrades and installed-base support High for technology leaders and service-rich models Medium; R&D and supply chain are critical, but customers carry fab capex High; orders and backlog move before revenue High through HBM, advanced logic and packaging intensity WFE TAM, backlog quality, service mix, China exposure, process-step wallet share
Process Control / Test / Metrology Capital equipment, probe cards, sockets, handlers, consumables and services High in process control and probe cards; medium in handlers and services Medium Medium to high; less purely cyclical when consumables/service mix is high High through HBM, AI SoC test time and advanced packaging yield control Test intensity, probe card ASP, platform cycles, installed base and recurring consumables
Materials / Wafers / Chemicals / Gases Consumables, wafers, specialty gases, chemicals, photomasks, engineered substrates, LTAs Medium to high; best where qualification barriers and specialty content are high Medium to high for wafers/gases; medium for specialty chemicals Medium; tied to wafer starts and fab utilization Medium to high through advanced nodes, EUV, HBM and fab buildout Wafer starts, qualification wins, material intensity, pricing under LTAs
OSAT / Advanced Packaging Assembly, packaging, test services, advanced package capacity and packaging equipment Low to medium in traditional OSAT; higher in scarce advanced packaging equipment/capacity Medium to high High for traditional OSAT; high but supply-constrained for advanced packaging Very high through CoWoS, HBM and 2.5D/3D packaging Advanced packaging mix, utilization, capex ROI, customer pre-commitments
Substrate / PCB / Interconnect Substrate/PCB/CCL sales; product mix and layer count drive ASP Medium; high-end ABF/AI PCB and low-loss materials can be stronger Medium to high High; consumer PCB and substrate cycles differ from AI server demand Very high through AI server/rack substrate, PCB and low-loss material content Layer count, ABF capacity, low-loss material mix, AI server share, yield
Optical / Photonics Modules, lasers, optical components, optical DSP, manufacturing services and systems Medium; components/DSP can be higher, modules face ASP erosion Medium High; cloud awards and telecom cycles can diverge sharply Very high through 800G/1.6T and cluster scale-out Port-speed migration, ASP erosion, customer awards, laser yield and product mix
EMS / ODM / Systems Manufacturing services, ODM design, rack/system integration, pass-through hardware revenue Low to medium; can improve with engineering complexity and rack-scale integration Low to medium but working capital can be heavy High; customer program timing and inventory swings matter High through AI server and rack integration Cash conversion, AI server mix, customer concentration, gross margin sustainability
Adjacent Infra / Industrial Enablers Power/cooling equipment, connectors/cables, fab services, precision subsystems, project revenue Medium to high depending on product vs turnkey/project mix Medium Medium; more tied to construction/project cycles than chip ASPs High through power density, liquid cooling and rack/fab infrastructure Backlog, power density, liquid cooling attach, project margin, component scarcity
Passives / Components / Sensors Electronic component sales through direct/distributor channels; mix drives ASP Medium; high-end auto/server components stronger than consumer commodity parts Medium Medium to high; distributor inventory cycles are important Medium through AI server power and high-frequency components Inventory cycle, high-end mix, utilization, auto/industrial content

Supply-Chain Relationship Map

产业链不是线性的。下面这张边表把“谁拉动谁、投资上应该读什么信号”拆开，适合后续做成监控 dashboard。

FromToFlowInvestment Read
EDA / IPFabless / ASICPDK/IP/tools turn architecture into tape-out-ready designsDesign starts and IP royalties lead future wafer demand.
Fabless / ASICFoundryDesigns buy wafer capacity on specific nodesAdvanced-node scarcity decides gross margin and launch timing.
Fabless / ASICMemoryAI/compute architectures pull HBM/DRAM/NAND bandwidthHBM allocation can be as decisive as accelerator supply.
Foundry / IDMWFEFab capacity and node migration drive tool ordersWFE orders are leading indicators for future wafer capacity.
Foundry / IDMMaterials / WafersWafer starts consume wafers, gases, photoresist, CMP and chemicalsMaterials lag tool orders but track utilization closely.
WFEProcess Control / TestHigher process complexity increases metrology/inspection and test intensityYield bottlenecks shift value to KLA/ATE/probe ecosystems.
Foundry / IDMOSAT / Advanced PackagingFinished wafers move into assembly, package and testAI packages move the bottleneck from wafer fab to package capacity.
MemoryOSAT / Advanced PackagingHBM stacking and memory test require specialized back-end capacityHBM test/stacking complexity creates non-memory beneficiaries.
OSAT / Advanced PackagingSubstrate / PCBAdvanced packages require ABF/BT substrates and high-end boardsSubstrate shortages can cap AI accelerator shipments.
Networking SiliconOptical / PhotonicsSwitch/DSP/retimer decisions define port speed and optical module demandTrack architecture and port migration together.
Substrate / PCBEMS / ODMBoards and substrates are assembled into servers, switches and racksAI PCB content can rise faster than server unit growth.
Optical / PhotonicsEMS / ODMModules and cables are integrated into switches/racksOptical award timing can foreshadow ODM revenue ramps.
Analog / PowerAdjacent InfraPower devices, controllers and modules connect chips to rack/facility powerPower density moves value to cooling and power management.
Adjacent InfraEMS / ODMPower, cooling, connectors and cable harnesses enable rack-scale systemsData-center constraints can bottleneck semiconductor demand.
EMS / ODMEnd MarketsSystems are delivered to cloud, enterprise, telecom, auto and industrial customersDemand quality must be checked beyond component pull-ins.

End-Market Crosswalk

同一家公司可能被多个终端需求拉动。这里把需求端拆成 AI data center、smartphone、auto/industrial、fab localization、networking/optical 和 storage/memory bandwidth，帮助你从需求变化反推供应链受益层。

AI Data Center / Accelerated Computing

Hyperscaler capex, accelerator deployment, rack-scale architecture, inference utilization, power availability.

拉动环节
Compute/AI chips, HBM, foundry, advanced packaging, substrate/PCB, networking silicon, optical, EMS/ODM, power/cooling, connectors.
代表公司
NVIDIA, Broadcom, AMD, Marvell, TSMC, SK hynix, Micron, ASE, Amkor, Unimicron, Ibiden, Innolight, Eoptolink, Arista, Quanta, Wiwynn, Vertiv, Delta, Amphenol.
建模角度
Do not stop at GPU revenue. Build rack-level value bridge: accelerator + HBM + package/substrate + switch/optics + power/cooling + ODM margin.
风险
Customer ROI fatigue, power bottlenecks, double ordering, custom ASIC substitution, supply bottleneck migration away from semis.

Smartphone / Consumer Electronics

Handset units, premium mix, China Android sell-through, Apple build plans, panel pricing, channel inventory.

拉动环节
Mobile SoC/modem, RF front-end, memory, display driver, image sensor, passives, EMS/ODM, PCB/HDI.
代表公司
Qualcomm, MediaTek, Skyworks, Qorvo, Maxscend, Will Semi, Sony, GalaxyCore, Novatek, Samsung Electronics, TSMC, Murata, Yageo, Hon Hai.
建模角度
Separate unit recovery from content growth. RF/CIS/SoC/DDI all have different ASP and inventory behavior even when tied to the same handset cycle.
风险
Weak sell-through after channel restock, Apple insourcing, Android price competition, display driver commoditization.

Automotive / Industrial

Auto production, EV inverter demand, industrial PMI, distributor inventory, long-cycle design-in conversion.

拉动环节
MCU, analog, power, sensors, SiC/GaN, passives, specialty foundry, test, industrial EMS.
代表公司
NXP, Infineon, STMicro, Renesas, ON Semi, TI, ADI, ROHM, StarPower, Melexis, X-FAB, Tower, Murata, TDK, Yageo.
建模角度
Use a longer-cycle framework: design-in wins and content per vehicle matter, but near-term earnings are still dominated by inventory and utilization.
风险
EV slowdown, SiC price pressure, customer inventory correction, China analog/power competition.

Fab Buildout / Localization / Sovereignty

TSMC/Samsung/Intel/SMIC/Micron capex, government incentives, export controls, regional capacity plans.

拉动环节
WFE, process control, materials, wafers, specialty gases, fab services, vacuum/precision components.
代表公司
ASML, Applied Materials, Lam, KLA, Tokyo Electron, ASM International, Advantest, Screen, DISCO, Shin-Etsu, SUMCO, Entegris, Linde, Air Liquide, NAURA, AMEC.
建模角度
Separate technology intensity from capacity additions. Advanced nodes raise equipment/material content; mature-node localization can still create overcapacity.
风险
Export controls, China pull-forward, capex pauses, subsidy-led returns below cost of capital.

Networking / Optical / Data Movement

Port-speed migration, AI cluster topology, Ethernet vs InfiniBand, 800G/1.6T awards, cloud network refresh.

拉动环节
Switch ASIC, optical DSP, retimers, active cables, optical modules, lasers, PCB/low-loss materials, networking systems.
代表公司
Broadcom, Marvell, NVIDIA, Credo, Astera Labs, MACOM, Coherent, Lumentum, Fabrinet, Ciena, Innolight, Eoptolink, Arista, Accton.
建模角度
Build a data-movement chain from switch silicon to module to cable to system. ASP erosion and speed migration must be modeled together.
风险
Rapid module commoditization, customer concentration, CPO timing, port-speed pull-forward.

Storage / Memory Bandwidth

HBM qualification, DRAM/NAND contract prices, enterprise SSD demand, nearline HDD demand, memory capex discipline.

拉动环节
DRAM, HBM, NAND, storage controllers, enterprise SSD, HDD, OSAT/test, WFE, wafers/materials.
代表公司
SK hynix, Micron, Samsung Electronics, Kioxia, Sandisk, Western Digital, Seagate, Phison, Silicon Motion, Advantest, Lam, Applied Materials.
建模角度
Treat HBM as structural mix and commodity DRAM/NAND as cycle. Use normalized earnings and do not annualize peak pricing blindly.
风险
Capex overreaction, HBM share loss, NAND overbuild, hidden channel inventory.

Segment Playbooks

每个环节都按二级分析师可执行的研究动作拆开：细分子环节、模型驱动、领先指标、风险/反证，以及第一步应该怎么建 coverage。

EDA / IP / Design Enablement

把系统需求转换为可制造芯片：工具链、IP block、验证、物理设计、tape-out 服务。

细分子环节
EDA core tools; verification/emulation; analog/custom IC design; physical implementation; IP licensing; ASIC design services; silicon lifecycle analytics.
模型驱动
Seat growth, token/cloud usage, maintenance renewal, IP royalties, hardware emulation backlog, design services NRE, China/export-control exposure.
领先指标
Advanced-node tape-outs, hyperscaler ASIC programs, foundry PDK releases, RPO/remaining performance obligations, emulation lead times, hiring in chip design teams.
风险 / 反证
Large customer insourcing, regulatory delay around major M&A, China restrictions, EDA seat saturation, weaker design starts in handset/consumer.
覆盖动作
Build peer table separating software-like EDA from IP royalty and design-service models; map each Core company to node complexity and AI/custom-silicon exposure.

Compute / AI / Logic Chips

承担数据中心、PC、边缘和嵌入式计算的核心逻辑芯片设计。

细分子环节
GPU/accelerators; server CPU; client CPU/GPU; FPGA/embedded; custom ASIC; DPU/NIC; edge AI SoC.
模型驱动
Datacenter revenue, accelerator ASP, HBM/CoWoS allocation, software/networking attach, cloud capex, product cadence, gross margin by platform.
领先指标
Hyperscaler capex revisions, AI server lead times, HBM supply contracts, TSMC advanced-node mix, ODM backlog, accelerator benchmark adoption.
风险 / 反证
Customer ROI fatigue, over-ordering, custom ASIC substitution, supply bottleneck moving outside chips, export restrictions, margin dilution from systems.
覆盖动作
Create AI compute scorecard: accelerator revenue, supply chain bottleneck, customer concentration, inference exposure, ecosystem lock-in and valuation sensitivity.

Mobile / RF / Connectivity

手机、IoT、CPE、汽车连接和消费电子的通信/射频/连接芯片。

细分子环节
Mobile AP/modem; RF front-end; Wi-Fi/Bluetooth; display driver; image sensor; IoT connectivity; touch/fingerprint/audio chips.
模型驱动
Handset units, premium mix, content per device, Android channel inventory, Apple content share, auto/IoT diversification, RF module integration.
领先指标
Smartphone sell-through, Taiwan fabless monthly revenue, China Android launch calendar, Apple build plans, distributor inventory, panel shipments.
风险 / 反证
Apple insourcing, Android ASP pressure, inventory rebuild without sell-through, RF overcapacity, display driver commoditization.
覆盖动作
Split companies into handset-beta, connectivity-beta, display-beta and image-sensor-beta; do not compare RF, CIS and DDI on one multiple without cycle adjustment.

Networking Silicon / SerDes / Data Movement

在AI集群里移动数据：交换、互联、SerDes、DSP、retimer、SmartNIC/DPU。

细分子环节
Switch ASIC; routing silicon; optical DSP; retimer; SerDes IP; DPU/NIC; active electrical cable; CXL/PCIe fabric.
模型驱动
Port-speed transition, switch radix, retimer attach rate, optical DSP ASP, custom silicon wins, cloud capex and AI cluster topology.
领先指标
800G/1.6T awards, Ethernet vs InfiniBand adoption, hyperscaler network architecture, Arista/Cisco order commentary, optical-module lead times.
风险 / 反证
ASP erosion faster than port upgrade, cloud customer concentration, internal silicon displacement, CPO timing uncertainty, one-time pull-ins.
覆盖动作
Map every company to scale-out, scale-up, electrical or optical layer; build a port-speed migration table from 400G to 800G to 1.6T.

Analog / Power / Mixed Signal

把真实世界的电源、信号、传感和控制连接到数字系统。

细分子环节
Signal chain; power management; power discrete/modules; SiC/GaN; MCU; sensors; isolation; automotive radar/driver ICs.
模型驱动
Industrial/auto inventory, channel sell-through, book-to-bill, utilization, pricing, SiC capacity, AI server power content.
领先指标
Distributor inventory days, auto production schedules, industrial PMI, EV inverter demand, data-center power density, lead times.
风险 / 反证
Inventory correction masked by backlog, SiC price collapse, auto platform delays, China analog price competition, underloaded internal fabs.
覆盖动作
Separate long-cycle auto/industrial quality names from consumer analog and China localization names; normalize margins for utilization.

Memory / Storage Semiconductors

提供计算系统的短期和长期数据存储，HBM成为AI训练核心瓶颈。

细分子环节
Commodity DRAM; HBM; NAND; enterprise SSD; HDD/nearline storage; NOR/specialty memory; controllers/modules.
模型驱动
DRAM/NAND ASP, bit shipments, capex, inventory days, HBM qualification, enterprise SSD contract mix, storage nearline demand.
领先指标
Spot/contract memory pricing, memory capex plans, HBM supply agreements, hyperscaler storage orders, China smartphone/PC demand, module channel inventory.
风险 / 反证
Annualizing peak ASP, HBM qualification loss, NAND overbuild, customer prebuy, capex discipline breakdown, hidden inventory at module makers.
覆盖动作
Build memory cycle sheet: ASP, bit growth, utilization, capex and HBM mix; value companies on normalized earnings and scenario margins.

Foundry / IDM Manufacturing

把芯片设计制造成晶圆；先进逻辑、成熟制程、特色工艺分属不同竞争逻辑。

细分子环节
Leading-edge logic; mature foundry; specialty RF/BCD/power; IDM logic; specialty MEMS/sensor; captive advanced packaging.
模型驱动
Utilization, wafer ASP, node mix, depreciation, capex, customer concentration, geographic capacity, subsidies, advanced packaging attach.
领先指标
Foundry monthly revenue, smartphone/PC sell-through, cloud ASIC tape-outs, WFE orders, fab utilization, node migration schedules.
风险 / 反证
Mature-node overcapacity, depreciation cliff, technology slip, customer concentration, geopolitical disruption, underpriced government-led expansion.
覆盖动作
Separate advanced-node scarcity from mature-node cyclical recovery; build utilization and depreciation sensitivity by node and geography.

Semicap Equipment

为晶圆厂提供制造设备，是半导体资本开支的核心传导层。

细分子环节
Lithography; deposition; etch; clean; CMP; implant; thermal; track; compound semi tools; back-end equipment overlap.
模型驱动
WFE TAM, orders, backlog, China mix, service revenue, installed base, node transition intensity, memory vs logic capex.
领先指标
TSMC/Samsung/Intel/Micron/SK capex, SEMI/WFE forecasts, equipment lead times, export-control updates, service growth.
风险 / 反证
China pull-forward, order cancellations, memory capex pause, customer concentration, export restrictions, domestic substitution at lower margin.
覆盖动作
Build WFE wallet-share map by process step and customer; do not treat ASML/Lam/KLA/AMAT/TEL as interchangeable equipment beta.

Process Control / Test / Metrology

用检测、量测和测试保障良率；先进节点和先进封装让价值量提升。

细分子环节
Metrology; inspection; ATE; probe cards; sockets/contactors; handlers; burn-in; system-level test; yield analytics.
模型驱动
Test time, probe card ASP, advanced-node process-control intensity, HBM/AI complexity, new tester platforms, consumables refresh.
领先指标
AI/HBM product ramps, KLA/Advantest/Teradyne orders, OSAT capex, yield bottlenecks, new package qualification.
风险 / 反证
One-platform demand spike, customer concentration, memory test pull-in, probe card pricing pressure, lower utilization at OSATs.
覆盖动作
Split process-control capital equipment from recurring probe/socket consumables; model AI/HBM test time as a separate driver.

Materials / Wafers / Chemicals / Gases

提供晶圆制造所需耗材，是良率、成本和供应链安全的基础。

细分子环节
Silicon wafers; SOI/engineered substrates; SiC/GaN substrates; photoresist; CMP slurry/pads; gases; wet chemicals; photomasks; carriers/pods.
模型驱动
Fab utilization, wafer starts, qualification wins, advanced-node material intensity, LTAs, gas onsite contracts, raw-material costs.
领先指标
Wafer shipments, fab utilization, WFE installation, foundry/memory capex, specialty gas pricing, EUV/advanced packaging material demand.
风险 / 反证
Inventory at fabs, price resets after LTAs, qualification delays, China localization price pressure, raw material cost squeeze.
覆盖动作
Create materials map by consumable frequency and qualification barrier; separate volume cyclicality from structural content growth.

OSAT / Advanced Packaging

把裸die封装成可用器件；先进封装成为AI系统性能瓶颈。

细分子环节
Wirebond; flip chip; WLCSP; fan-out; SiP; 2.5D/3D; HBM stacking; test services; packaging equipment.
模型驱动
Advanced packaging capacity, utilization, capex, AI customer mix, substrate availability, test hours, package ASP.
领先指标
CoWoS/HBM capacity expansions, OSAT monthly revenue, substrate lead times, AI accelerator ramps, packaging equipment orders.
风险 / 反证
Traditional OSAT price pressure, captive foundry packaging share, capex without customer prepayment, utilization dip after ramp.
覆盖动作
Separate traditional OSAT from advanced-packaging equipment and AI packaging capacity; watch capital intensity and customer concentration.

Substrate / PCB / Interconnect

把芯片、封装和系统连接起来；AI服务器提升层数、材料和良率要求。

细分子环节
ABF substrate; BT substrate; HDI; high-layer server PCB; low-loss CCL/prepreg; connectors/cables; thermal PCB materials.
模型驱动
Layer count, ABF capacity, low-loss material mix, AI server/rack demand, yield, customer qualification, capex discipline.
领先指标
AI server ODM orders, GPU/ASIC substrate allocation, CCL pricing, Taiwan PCB monthly revenue, cloud switch port-speed transition.
风险 / 反证
ABF overbuild, yield miss on high-layer boards, customer concentration, material shortages, server pull-forward.
覆盖动作
Build AI server BOM bridge: substrate, PCB, CCL, connector/cable and thermal content per rack.

Optical / Photonics

把数据中心和通信网络里的高速电信号转成光信号并传输。

细分子环节
Datacom transceivers; telecom coherent optics; lasers; optical DSP; passive optical components; silicon photonics; CPO/optical engines.
模型驱动
Port-speed mix, module ASP erosion, hyperscaler awards, laser yield, DSP content, 800G/1.6T ramp, telecom inventory.
领先指标
Cloud optical awards, 800G/1.6T shipments, Arista/NVIDIA/Broadcom architecture, laser lead times, China optical monthly revenue.
风险 / 反证
Rapid ASP erosion, customer concentration, module commoditization, CPO timing uncertainty, telecom downturn spillover.
覆盖动作
Separate module assemblers from laser/DSP/component suppliers; build port-speed migration and ASP erosion scenarios.

EMS / ODM / Systems

把芯片、板卡、电源、散热和机柜集成为服务器、网络设备和电子系统。

细分子环节
AI server ODM; rack integration; networking white box; EMS; enterprise server OEM; storage systems; liquid-cooled system integration.
模型驱动
AI server revenue, rack-scale attach, backlog, inventory, customer concentration, working capital, gross margin by system complexity.
领先指标
Hyperscaler capex, ODM monthly revenue, GPU allocation, power/cooling availability, rack-scale design wins, networking switch demand.
风险 / 反证
Low-margin pass-through revenue, inventory financing, customer concentration, delayed GPU allocation, governance/accounting risk.
覆盖动作
Track AI server dollars and margin separately; compare ODMs on cash conversion, customer mix and rack-scale engineering content.

Adjacent Infra / Industrial Enablers

半导体和AI基础设施的外溢工业层：电力、散热、连接器、精密零部件和自动化。

细分子环节
Data-center power; UPS; cooling/liquid cooling; connectors; cables; vacuum components; precision machining; fab engineering; automation.
模型驱动
Backlog, project timing, power density, liquid-cooling attach, fab construction, WFE installed base, connector/cable content per rack.
领先指标
Data-center power awards, utility/grid constraints, liquid cooling adoption, fab build permits, WFE subsystem orders, ODM rack shipments.
风险 / 反证
Project slippage, margin dilution from turnkey work, component commoditization, capex double-ordering, customer concentration.
覆盖动作
Create an AI infrastructure adjacency screen; distinguish chip-cycle exposure from data-center construction and fab-services exposure.

Passives / Components / Sensors

为电子系统提供基础元器件、传感和连接，是半导体景气的低频传导层。

细分子环节
MLCC; inductors; resistors; filters; ceramic packages; sensors; display components; modules.
模型驱动
Distributor inventory, auto/industrial content, high-end MLCC mix, smartphone/PC units, server content, utilization.
领先指标
MLCC lead times, auto production, smartphone builds, distributor sell-through, high-frequency component demand, Taiwan/Japan component monthly data.
风险 / 反证
Inventory rebound without end demand, low-end price competition, overcapacity, weak consumer electronics, auto destocking.
覆盖动作
Separate passive-cycle leaders from display-cycle names and specialty ceramic/package suppliers; normalize for inventory swings.
6. Build and refresh

Regional Supply-Chain Lens

半导体不是一个单一地区产业。不同区域掌握不同价值环节，投资上要把区域优势、短板和地缘风险一起看。

United States

强项
AI accelerators, EDA/IP, analog, WFE/process control, networking silicon, storage systems and data-center infrastructure.
短板
Advanced manufacturing share, some packaging/substrate dependence, Asia-heavy supply chain for many hardware layers.
代表公司
NVIDIA, Broadcom, AMD, Qualcomm, Marvell, Synopsys, Cadence, Applied Materials, Lam, KLA, TI, ADI, Micron, Amkor, Vertiv, Amphenol.
研究角度
US coverage often starts with design/platform economics, then checks supply bottlenecks in Taiwan/Korea/Japan and downstream AI capex.

Taiwan

强项
Foundry, ASIC services, fabless SoC, OSAT, substrates/PCB, server ODM, optical modules and AI server supply chain.
短板
Geopolitical concentration, power/water constraints, dependence on imported equipment/materials at the highest end.
代表公司
TSMC, UMC, MediaTek, GUC, Alchip, ASE, Unimicron, Elite Material, Quanta, Wiwynn, Hon Hai, GlobalWafers, Realtek, Novatek.
研究角度
Taiwan is the physical center of AI hardware conversion from design to rack. Monthly revenue data can be a powerful high-frequency signal.

South Korea

强项
Memory/HBM, NAND, advanced packaging equipment, materials, test consumables, substrate/PCB and Samsung-led ecosystem.
短板
Memory cyclicality, customer concentration in domestic giants, foundry share uncertainty.
代表公司
Samsung Electronics, SK hynix, Samsung Electro-Mechanics, Hanmi Semiconductor, HPSP, Wonik IPS, Soulbrain, ISC, Leeno, Simmtech.
研究角度
Korea is the highest-signal region for HBM, memory capex and memory-linked back-end/test bottlenecks.

Japan

强项
WFE, metrology, precision processing, wafers, photoresist/materials, photomasks, components and specialty semis.
短板
Fewer leading-edge logic designers; some companies are conglomerates where semi exposure must be isolated.
代表公司
Tokyo Electron, Advantest, DISCO, Screen, Lasertec, Shin-Etsu, SUMCO, Tokyo Ohka, Renesas, Sony, Ibiden, Murata, TDK.
研究角度
Japan is the cleanest lens for manufacturing intensity: process complexity, materials content and precision equipment.

China / Hong Kong

强项
Mature foundry, domestic fabless, RF/analog/power localization, WFE/materials substitution, OSAT, PCB, optical modules and EMS.
短板
Advanced-node equipment restrictions, technology gaps in EUV/EDA/high-end materials, policy-driven overcapacity risk.
代表公司
SMIC, Hua Hong, Will Semi, Maxscend, SG Micro, GigaDevice, Montage, Hygon, Cambricon, NAURA, AMEC, Piotech, JCET, Tongfu, Innolight.
研究角度
China coverage should separate real share gain from subsidy/capex cycles; export-control headlines can change both fundamentals and multiples.

Europe

强项
Lithography, deposition, packaging equipment, power/auto semis, specialty foundry, engineered substrates, industrial power/cooling.
短板
Limited advanced-node fabless ecosystem and lower exposure to direct AI accelerator design.
代表公司
ASML, ASM International, BE Semiconductor, Infineon, STMicro, X-FAB, Soitec, Siltronic, VAT, Schneider Electric, Melexis.
研究角度
Europe is a strong auto/industrial and manufacturing-enablement region; valuation often hinges on cycle normalization and strategic scarcity.

ASEAN / Singapore / Malaysia / Thailand

强项
OSAT, test, EMS, precision manufacturing, optical manufacturing and supply-chain diversification.
短板
Fewer global design leaders; many names are services/manufacturing with customer concentration.
代表公司
Fabrinet, Inari Amertron, Unisem, MPI, AEM, UMS, Venture, Frencken, Vitrox, Greatech.
研究角度
ASEAN is the diversification and back-end manufacturing lens: follow utilization, customer wins and relocation-driven capex.

Coverage Build Roadmap

从行业地图走向真正 coverage，需要把 taxonomy、数据、模型、Core 公司研究和监控系统分阶段推进。

Phase 1 - Universe and taxonomy

Question: Who belongs in the investable semi tech map and why?

Output: Segment taxonomy, priority classification, ticker normalization, dual-listing map.

Action: Lock segment_id and priority before adding market data.

Phase 2 - Source and market-data refresh

Question: Which facts are official, which are CIQ/consensus, and which are assumptions?

Output: CIQ export merge, source ledger, market-data as-of fields, unresolved source gaps.

Action: Refresh Core companies first; do not publish valuation screens with needs_CIQ fields.

Phase 3 - Segment models

Question: What moves earnings revisions for each value-chain node?

Output: KPI dashboards by segment: WFE orders, memory ASP, foundry utilization, AI server rack BOM, optical port speed.

Action: Build segment-specific drivers instead of a one-size-fits-all semi comp table.

Phase 4 - Core company work

Question: Which 100-150 companies deserve analyst time first?

Output: Core company tearsheets, source packs, thesis debates, model templates and comp groups.

Action: Start with Core companies where segment profit pools and end-market leverage overlap.

Phase 5 - Monitoring system

Question: How do we know when the view changes?

Output: Catalyst calendar, earnings tracker, monthly data monitor, supply-chain signal log.

Action: Tie each thesis to explicit falsifiers and high-frequency data points.

Analyst Glossary

给刚开始 cover 半导体/tech hardware 的分析师准备的高频术语表，便于把公司法说、卖方报告和产业链访谈快速对齐。

TermResearch meaning
HBMHigh Bandwidth Memory，高带宽 DRAM 堆叠，是 AI accelerator 的核心瓶颈之一。
CoWoSTSMC 的 2.5D advanced packaging 平台，连接 GPU/ASIC、HBM 和 interposer。
ABF substrate高端封装基板，AI accelerator 和 high-end CPU/GPU 常用，供需会影响出货。
SerDesSerializer/Deserializer，高速串并转换 I/O，是 switch/ASIC/retimer 的关键模块。
Retimer重整高速信号的芯片，PCIe/CXL/高速互联中随速度升级提高 attach。
Optical DSP光模块中的数字信号处理芯片，决定高速光通信性能和 BOM 价值。
OSATOutsourced Semiconductor Assembly and Test，第三方封装测试厂。
WFEWafer Fab Equipment，晶圆制造设备，通常是半导体 capex 周期最直接传导层。
PDKProcess Design Kit，foundry 提供给设计公司的工艺设计套件。
Tape-out芯片设计定稿并交付制造，是 EDA/IP 和 foundry 后续需求的领先信号。
Utilization产能利用率，foundry/OSAT/IDM 毛利弹性的核心变量。
ASPAverage Selling Price，平均售价；memory、optical、PCB 等环节尤其关键。
Bit growth存储出货容量增长，用于分析 DRAM/NAND 供需而不只看单位出货。
Book-to-bill订单/出货比，常用于设备、模拟、工业链条判断周期位置。
Yield良率，先进制程、先进封装、光模块和 substrate 的核心利润变量。
NRENon-recurring engineering，一次性工程开发收入，ASIC 服务和 design services 常见。
SiC / GaN宽禁带功率半导体材料，用于 EV、工业、电源和高效率功率转换。
CXL / PCIe高速互联标准，推动 retimer、switch、memory pooling 和 server connectivity。
LTALong-term agreement，长期供货/定价协议，材料、memory、foundry、substrate 都可能出现。
Mid-cycle earnings跨周期正常化盈利，适合 memory、foundry、WFE、analog 等周期行业估值。

CIQ Refresh Blueprint

下一步使用 CIQ/Capital IQ 时，建议先用随附的 semi_ciq_refresh_template_core.csv 刷 Core 公司，再按这些字段导出并 merge 到 CSV/JSON。这样可以把行业地图升级成可估值、可筛选、可更新的 coverage database。

  • Primary ticker / exchange / CIQ company ID
  • Market cap, enterprise value, net debt, shares outstanding
  • FY-1/FY0/FY1 revenue, gross margin, EBIT margin, FCF margin
  • EV/Sales, EV/EBITDA, P/E, FCF yield
  • Consensus FY1/FY2 revenue growth and EPS growth
  • Segment revenue split and geography split where available
  • Top holders, short interest, free float and index membership
  • Next earnings date, fiscal year-end, reporting currency
  • Company description and business-segment tags for reconciliation

Source & Methodology

第一版以公开资料和行业知识搭建结构；公司级市场数据预留字段，不把未经批量刷新确认的估值数字混入正式表格。

Source laneUsed forConfidenceReference
SIA - How are Semiconductors Made?High-level value-chain sequence: R&D, design, front-end manufacturing, back-end manufacturing, board/system assembly.Primary industry association; stable taxonomy source.https://www.semiconductors.org/semiconductors-101/how-are-semiconductors-made/
SIA - Market Data / WSTS overviewWSTS data scope, product categories, monthly shipment data, units, ASPs, regional and product breakouts.Primary industry association describing WSTS data products.https://www.semiconductors.org/data-resources/market-data/
SIA/WSTS - April 2026 global semiconductor sales releaseLatest public industry cycle snapshot: April 2026 global sales, regional growth and Spring 2026 WSTS forecast context.Primary SIA release based on WSTS three-month moving-average shipment data.https://www.semiconductors.org/global-semiconductor-sales-increase-11-month-to-month-in-april/
SIA / Deloitte - Powering AI data-center semiconductor stackAI rack semiconductor content, AI data-center capex framing and cross-stack chip demand mapping.Primary industry association release summarizing SIA/Deloitte study; use report for deeper diligence.https://www.semiconductors.org/new-report-finds-semiconductors-account-for-95-of-an-ai-data-server-racks-value-encompassing-the-full-stack-of-chip-technologies/
WSTS homepage and forecast releasesIndustry shipment data cadence and semiconductor market-monitoring framework.Primary industry statistics body; use exact market figures only after checking release date and methodology.https://www.wsts.org/
SIA - 2025 State of the U.S. Semiconductor IndustryStrategic context on US semiconductor leadership, manufacturing capacity and policy-driven supply-chain localization.Primary industry association report page.https://www.semiconductors.org/2025-state-of-the-u-s-semiconductor-industry/
SEMI market data / industry reportsWFE, materials, packaging, fab capacity and equipment-market framing.Primary equipment/materials association; detailed datasets may be subscriber-only.https://www.semi.org/en/market-data
SEMI - 2025 worldwide silicon wafer shipments and revenueWafer-shipment cycle context, AI-driven advanced wafer demand and mature-node stabilization signals.Primary SEMI / Silicon Manufacturers Group release.https://www.semi.org/en/semi-press-release/semi-reports-2025-annual-worldwide-silicon-wafer-shipments-and-revenue-results
Company filings and investor relationsCompany business descriptions, segment exposure, products, customer concentration and listing status.Primary source; should be refreshed for every Core company before publication.Issuer IR / annual reports / 10-K / 20-F / exchange filings
CIQ export refreshMarket cap, EV, FY revenue, gross margin, EV/Sales, P/E, consensus growth, identifiers and ownership.Preferred market-data and consensus source once exported or accessed through Chrome.User-provided CIQ account/export
Data cut-off: 2026-06-18. This is a research mapping artifact, not investment advice. Exact market data fields should be refreshed through CIQ/export before use in valuation screens or publication-quality comp tables.
